title: Jupyter Notebook History Viewer
description: Configuration for the version history and change tracking system in collaborative notebooks

maxVersions.title: Maximum Versions
maxVersions.description: Maximum number of versions to retain in history

retentionDays.title: Retention Period (Days)
retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain version history

diffVisualization.title: Diff Visualization Mode
diffVisualization.description: How to visualize differences between versions

autoSaveInterval.title: Auto-save Interval (seconds)
autoSaveInterval.description: Interval in seconds for auto-saving versions (0 to disable)

trackOutputs.title: Track Cell Outputs
trackOutputs.description: Whether to track cell outputs in history

showInSidebar.title: Show in Sidebar
showInSidebar.description: Whether to show the history viewer in the sidebar

sidebarPosition.title: Sidebar Position
sidebarPosition.description: Position of the history viewer in the sidebar

defaultView.title: Default View
defaultView.description: Default view mode for the history viewer

showUserInfo.title: Show User Information
showUserInfo.description: Whether to show user information for each change

showTimestamps.title: Show Timestamps
showTimestamps.description: Whether to show timestamps for each change
